name: Pumpkin Date Nut Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the pumpkin pie filling, milk, egg, butter, salt, bread flour, whole-grain wheat flour, brown sugar, vital wheat gluten, cinnamon, ginger, nutmeg, allspice, and yeast to a food processor in the order listed.
2. Bake on the fruit and nut cycle until a beep sounds.
3. Turn off the machine.
4. Add the walnuts and dates.
5. Turn off the machine again.
6. Makes a 1 1/2 pound loaf.
